# Supabase Official Integration Mastery

This mastery hub synchronizes the **Official Supabase agentic skills** currently active in the `.ai/skills` system. It provides the definitive technical architecture and standards for Backend-as-a-Service (BaaS) and high-performance Postgres management.

## 🛠️ Technical Architecture

| Feature | Sovereign Implementation |
|---------|-----------|
| **PostgreSQL** | Primary database (direct + pooled URLs). |
| **Auth** | User management via `@supabase/ssr` (Next.js App Router). |
| **Storage** | Object storage for user uploads and media. |
| **Realtime** | WebSocket-based DB change subscriptions. |
| **Row Level Security** | Native multi-tenant isolation. |

### Monorepo Integration
```typescript
// packages/shared/src/lib/supabase/server.ts
import { createServerClient } from '@supabase/ssr'
import { cookies } from 'next/headers'

export function createSupabaseServerClient() {
  const cookieStore = cookies()
  return createServerClient(
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!,
    {
      cookies: {
        getAll() { return cookieStore.getAll() },
        setAll(cookiesToSet) {
          cookiesToSet.forEach(({ name, value, options }) =>
            cookieStore.set(name, value, options)
          )
        },
      },
    }
  )
}
```

### RLS (Row Level Security) Standard
```sql
-- Enable RLS and define owner-only policy
ALTER TABLE bookings ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "users_own_bookings" ON bookings
  FOR ALL USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
```

### Database & Platform
- **supabase**: General integration protocols for the Supabase platform ecosystem.
- **supabase-postgres-best-practices**: Advanced standards for indexing, RLS (Row Level Security), and SQL performance within Supabase.

## 🛡️ Common Pitfalls
- **[SM-001]** Directly using `supabase-js` in Server Components instead of `@supabase/ssr` — causes cookie sync issues.
- **[SM-002]** Exposing `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` in the frontend — absolute security bypass.
- **[SM-003]** Forgetting to enable RLS — tables remain public until RLS is explicitly enabled.
- **[SM-004]** Not paginating `.select('*')` queries — Supabase does not apply automatic limits.
- **[SM-005]** Leaking Realtime channel subscriptions — memory leaks in client-side React.
- **[SM-006]** Blind `.upsert()` usage — can silently overwrite data without active unique constraints.

## ✅ Success Criteria
- [ ] `database.types.ts` generated from schema and committed.
- [ ] RLS enabled on every user-scoped table.
- [ ] `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` restricted to server-side admin logic.
- [ ] `getUser()` used in Server Components for secure identity verification.
- [ ] All Supabase responses validated via Zod schemas.

## 📥 Execution Protocol
To invoke any of these synced skills within a project, use the corresponding slash command mapped in the system router.
